# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-07-08 | **更新时间**: 07:26 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[22:00]` **科罗拉多大学安舒茨分校、UCHealth 和科罗拉多州儿童医院与拜耳结成战略联盟，以推进药物开发和临床试验**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *The University of Colorado Anschutz, along with UCHealth and Children's Hospital Colorado, Form Strategic Alliance with Bayer to Advance Drug Development and Clinical Trials* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:30]` **FibroBiologics 完成第三批 CYWC628 药品的生产，用于 1/2 期糖尿病足溃疡临床试验**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *FibroBiologics Completes Manufacturing of Third Batch of CYWC628 Drug Product for Phase 1/2 Diabetic Foot Ulcer Clinical Trial* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:02]` **🏛️监管 | Emmecell 的 EO2002 获得 FDA 再生医学先进疗法 (RMAT) 指定，用于治疗角膜内皮疾病**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Emmecell Receives FDA Regenerative Medicine Advanced Therapy (RMAT) Designation for EO2002 for the Treatment of Corneal Endothelial Disease* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[08:25]` **全球首例国际患者在嘉会国际癌症中心开始接受新批准的针对实体瘤的 CAR-T 细胞疗法的治疗**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Weltweit erster internationaler Patient beginnt im Jiahui International Cancer Center die Behandlung mit einer neu zugelassenen CAR-T-Zelltherapie gegen solide Tumoren* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

---
